zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucia de Cam於1370年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾可諾希頓時，她的父親Roger De Cam21歲，母親Jane De Cam21歲。她於1390年與Ralph Harding在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾凱姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Ba, Chau, Coung, Cun, Cuong, Duc, Giao, Hai, Hieu, Hoa, Hoanh, Hung, Kinh Van.  Chinese Kang, Wing, Ying, Young.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 甘, see   Gan   1.
Vietnamese (Cầm): from the Chinese surname 琴, see Qin 2.

variants.name: Camm
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Cam  .

variants.name: Gan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Li, Hong, Hua, Jee, Jian, Cheong, Chin, Chuan, Eng, Hui Ming, Jianmin, Jing.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 甘, meaning ‘sweet, pleasant’ in Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Gan Pan (甘盤), a high official during the reign of King Wu Ding (died 1192  BC ), in the Shang dynasty. (ii) from Gan (甘), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Shaanxi province) during the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ). (iii) from Gan (甘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Luoyang in Henan province) granted to Dai, who was known as Gan Zhao Gong (甘昭公, Duke Zhao of Gan), son of King Xiang of Zhou (died 619  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 干, meaning ‘shield’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Gan Chou (干犨), an official in the state of Song (located in present-day Shangqiu in Henan province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). (ii) from the placename Gan (邗), the name of a fief (located in present-day Yangzhou in Jiangsu province) that was granted to the son of King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ). When the placename was adopted as a surname, people simplified the Chinese character 邗 to 干, which has the same pronunciation. (iii) from the placename Gan Sui (干隧) (located in present-day Wuxian in Jiangsu province). (iv) from the He Gan (紇干) family, of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surname to 干 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534 AD ). (v) from the compound surname Gan-Lei (干類), said to be originally the name of an ancient state (unknown location) prior to the Xia dynasty (2070–1600 BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Lucia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman given name Lucius, which is probably a derivative of Latin lux ‘light’. The girl's name is common in Italy and elsewhere, and is found as a learned, Latinate doublet of Lucy in England. St Lucia of Syracuse, who was martyred in 304 , was a very popular saint in the Middle Ages; she is often represented in medieval art as blinded and with her eyes on a platter, but the tradition that she had her eyes put out is probably based on nothing more than the association between light and eyes.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucia de Cam was born in 1370, in Knossington, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger De Cam, was 21 and her mother, Jane De Cam, was 21. She married Ralph Harding in 1390, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1450, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Cam, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucia de Cam est née en 1370, à Knossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger De Cam, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Jane De Cam, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Harding en 1390, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1450, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Cam, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucia de Cam 1370 in Knossington, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger De Cam 21 und ihre Mutter Jane De Cam 21. Sie hat 1390 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph Harding geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cam, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Newcastle-Upon-Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Lucia de Cam(이)가 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 노징턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger De Cam(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane De Cam(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 Ralph Harding(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 캄에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Ralph Harding em 1390, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Newcastle-Upon-Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucia de Cam родилась в 1370 г. в местности носсингтон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger De Cam было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jane De Cam, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Harding в 1390 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1450 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности кам, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
